title: Panag, Babu & Sarangi inducts three lawyers into Partnership
description: Panag, Babu & Sarangi has announced the induction of Ridhima Khurana, Guneet Gudh and Lavanyaa Chopra to the firm’s Partnership.Khurana is a member of the Technology Laws & Strategic Transactions practice group. She read law at the National Law University, Odisha, and has been an integral part of the firm’s Technology Laws and Strategic Transactions practice. Her practice sits at the intersection of helping global technology companies on India entry and strategic transactions. Khurana ha
